text: A frog is an amphibian with moist skin, strong back legs, and no tail as an adult
original_text: A frog is an amphibian with moist skin, strong back legs, and no tail as an adult.

text: frogs often begin life as aquatic tadpoles before becoming adults
original_text: Frogs often begin life as aquatic tadpoles before becoming adults.

text: frogs breathe through lungs and can also exchange gases through their skin
original_text: Frogs breathe through lungs and can also exchange gases through their skin.

text: frogs are sensitive to environmental changes, especially pollution and habitat loss
original_text: Frogs are sensitive to environmental changes, especially pollution and habitat loss.

text: the meatball respects frogs for being swampy transformation experts
